svg.text: mHC scheduling with EP overlap and TE partial CUDA graphs
Illustrative steady-state 1F1B window; widths show ordering, not measured silicon time
A. Supported now: partial CUDA graph + EP overlap + standalone mHC post
mhc_high_priority_stream_mode=post; selective mHC recompute is off
layer j backward / layer i forward
layer i forward / layer j backward
B. Supported alternative: explicit mHC group recompute + EP overlap (eager)
mhc_high_priority_stream_mode=all; recompute node and standalone post share one high-priority stream
recompute group N backward / other microbatch forward
Current constraint: EP overlap + selective mHC recompute + any CUDA graph is rejected; explicit group replay is eager-only.
